summary: Comprehensive testing of 3-theme system (dark/light/gradient) across entire website. All theme features working correctly: Navigation toggle cycles through themes, Dashboard sidebar 3-way switch syncs with Nav, theme persists via localStorage across all pages.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer dimension warnings during page load - cosmetic, not functional

passed_tests: Navigation theme toggle (data-testid='nav-theme-toggle') cycles dark → light → gradient → dark - PASS
Landing page Dark theme: dark background (#050505), white text, noise overlay visible - PASS
Landing page Light theme: light gray background (#f4f5f9), dark text, noise overlay hidden - PASS
Landing page Gradient theme: dark gradient backgrounds, noise overlay hidden - PASS
Theme persists when navigating from landing to dashboard - PASS
Dashboard sidebar 3-way switch (theme-btn-dark, theme-btn-light, theme-btn-gradient) all work - PASS
Dashboard sidebar theme change syncs to landing page - PASS
Market page (/market) respects all 3 themes with site-subpage class - PASS
Tuning page (/tuning) respects all 3 themes with site-subpage class - PASS
Theme icons change correctly: Moon (dark), Sun (light), Layers (gradient) - PASS
Gradient theme applies CSS gradients to bg-[#111111] elements - PASS
Canvas animation dimmed in light theme (opacity: 0.25) - PASS
No console errors across all pages and themes - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeContext implementation is clean with THEMES array and nextTheme() for cycling
CSS overrides in index.css properly target [data-site-theme] selectors for site-wide theming
Gradient theme correctly applies linear-gradient backgrounds with box-shadow for inset glow effect
Both Navigation and Dashboard sidebar share the same ThemeContext - properly synced
localStorage key 'dash-theme' used consistently across the app
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-theme system fully implemented and tested. Themes: dark (default), light, gradient. Navigation has single toggle button that cycles through themes. Dashboard sidebar has 3 separate buttons with animated indicator. Both use shared DashboardThemeContext with localStorage persistence (key: 'dash-theme'). CSS variables for dashboard: --d-bg, --d-surface, etc. Site-wide overrides target [data-site-theme] attribute on root div. Gradient theme applies CSS gradients to .bg-[#111111] elements. Noise overlay hidden in light and gradient themes. Canvas animation dimmed in light theme.
